content.en:
Ye Tian exited the level and entered the Illusory World Battle Tower again.

He's going to challenge the seventh floor of the tower again!

Although he thought that he had already stepped into the battle power of the Eternal Universe Child, if he couldn't break through the seventh layer of the Battle Tower, he would not be considered an Eternal Universe Child.

The seventh floor of the battle tower.

Ye Tian stepped in and confronted the Constant-level Son of the Universe again.

This time, Ye Tian did not fall into the disadvantage at all, and even vaguely suppressed the other party.

Spatial talent and spatial supernatural power suppressed the opponent, using the Tianyue Knife as a means of attack, Ye Tian and the Eternal Universe Son fought for a long time on the seventh layer of the battle tower.

Finally.

Ye Tian hit the other party hard, but he was not injured.

Suddenly.

The Eternal Rank Son of the Universe disappeared, and he disappeared automatically, not by Ye Tian's slashing and disappearing.

"Could it be that I made it?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Swish!

Ye Tian was teleported out of the seventh floor of the battle tower and was told that he had broken through the seventh floor of the battle tower.

In fact, as long as the strength of the Eternal Universe Son and the Eternal Universe Son is not much different, it is difficult to kill each other, and if it is really killed to the end, it is not impossible for the weaker Eternal Universe Son and the slightly stronger Eternal Universe Son to die together.

Therefore, the setting of the seventh layer of the battle tower is that as long as the Eternal Universe Son is suppressed, or remains undefeated, it will be regarded as the combat power of the Eternal Universe Son.

And Ye Tian not only suppressed the other party, but also seriously injured the other party, so he naturally broke through the seventh layer.

After breaking through the seventh layer, Ye Tian gained 6400 points.

At this time, Ye Tian was happy.

And suddenly, a bell rang through the yellow-level area, and all the highnesses heard this bell.

The bell rings for a long time and does not dissipate for a long time.

Bibo Lake, a certain cultivation tower.

His Royal Highness the Holy Heaven opened his eyes from his cultivation, revealing a look of astonishment.

"It's ...... Henggu Clock !!"

There is an Eternal Ancient Bell in the yellow-level area, where the Eternal Bell is, he doesn't know, but he knows that as long as someone steps into the combat power of the Eternal Ancient Son of the Universe, the Eternal Ancient Bell will automatically ring, representing that His Royal Highness has become the peak of the Eternal Ancient Level.

The bell is a celebration of celebration!

And now, the Henggu bell has sounded, representing the birth of a Henggu-level highness in the yellow-level region.

"It's him, His Highness Wanfa, he has become His Royal Highness of the Eternal Ancient Level!!"

His Highness was shocked.

The combat power of the Eternal Universe Son that he dreamed of even paid a great price for it, but it was still a lot worse, but he didn't expect that only a few years had passed since the original battle, and Ye Tian had already far surpassed him and become an Eternal Highness.

The speed of progress made him unbelievable!

If he hadn't fought Ye Tian in person, he would even think that Ye Tian would have been the son of the Eternal Universe a long time ago.

"It's really a blow to be the same era as such a child of the universe!"

His Royal Highness said helplessly.

It is not the one who recognizes the Henggu Bell, except for the new Highness, most of the other Highnesses recognize the Henggu Bell, because when the three Henggu-level Highnesses have not yet fallen, many Highnesses have personally witnessed the ringing of the Henggu Bell!

The Henggu bell rang, and His Royal Highness the Henggu level was born, which was a grand event in the yellow-level area of the supreme hall of the human race!

Town Palace.

The envoys of the town hall also heard the Henggu bell.

"The Eternal Bell in the Yellow-level area has ringed, who has stepped into the Eternal Universe Child?"

At the same time, the god lord of the platform was surprised, but also showed doubts.

At this time, a town hall envoy guessed: "It is more likely that His Highness Wanfa, there are currently two first-grade peak-level cosmic sons in the yellow-level area, in addition to His Highness Wanfa, there is only His Highness the Holy Heaven left, His Highness the Holy Heaven has a good talent, and he is expected to become His Highness the Eternal Ancient Level, but it is by no means now." And His Highness Wanfa swept away all the Highnesses in the yellow-level region a few years ago, condensed the supreme power, and truly realized his own way of supreme strength, and he had the greatest possibility of becoming the son of the Eternal Universe!"

"The birth of the Eternal Universe Child, this is a big event, let's go over and take a look together!"

The Divine Lord said.

The other town hall envoys had no opinion, and they all went to the yellow-level area.

In an instant, they came to the yellow-level area, and after a little investigation, they learned who His Highness was the son of the eternal universe.

"Sure enough, it's His Highness Wanfa!"

There was no surprise at all.

"Let's report above, once His Highness becomes the son of the Eternal Universe, a large number of rewards will be given, and this time it is estimated that more rewards will be given, after all, His Highness Wanfa is the only Constant-level Highness of our human race at the Emperor level!"

"Well, it's a debrief!"

The other envoys nodded their heads.

The six town hall envoys reported to the above that Ye Tian had become the son of the Eternal Universe, and as for what reward should be given above, it was the decision of the above.

In just one day, the high-level leaders of the Terran Supreme Hall gave the reward.

And these rewards were distributed by the envoys of the town hall, and it was impossible for the real high-level leaders of the Supreme Hall of the Terran race to come forward.

this day.

Yellow level area, Bibo Lake.

Boom!!!

A golden light enveloped the area, and endless coercion descended.

At the same time, a voice descended

"His Highness Wanfa has achieved the son of the Eternal Ancient Universe and has become the only Eternal Ancient Highness in the Yellow Rank region, and the Supreme Hall of the Human Race will give you a special reward!"

"Your Highness Henggu, come out!"

The envoys of the six town halls appeared, standing on the other side of the golden light.

This scene stunned the other five highnesses of Bibo Lake and came out one after another.

"This is the Supreme Hall of the Human Race's commendation for His Highness the Eternal Ancient Level!"

His Highness was full of envy.

Once, he had also witnessed this scene with his own eyes, but that Eternal Highness had already fallen.

"I don't know how many benefits the Supreme Hall of the Human Race will reward His Highness Wanfa!"

His Highness was a little curious.

Wow!

Ye Tian came out of the cultivation tower and saw the six cosmic gods, so he said respectfully: "I have seen six town hall envoys!"

The six town hall envoys walked on the Cotai Avenue, step by step, and soon came to Ye Tian's face.

At the same time, there are more and more highnesses gathered around, after all, the award scene created by the six town hall envoys is too sensational, although the golden light only covers this area, but it can be seen clearly from a long distance, and the sound also resounded throughout the yellow-level area, it is difficult for other highnesses to know it.

Standing at the forefront, the Divine Lord of the Shotai took out a scroll, as if it were the holy decree of the ancient emperor.

"Your Highness Wanfa, the Supreme Hall of the Human Race will give you a reward!"

"His Royal Highness the Eternal Ancient Level, from today onwards, His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws can access all the secret techniques of the Yellow Level Regional Inheritance Treasure Pavilion for free, even if it is a great magic power, it is no longer restricted. Many secrets are also open to His Highness Wanfa without restrictions......"

"The second reward is to give His Highness Wanfa 10,000 points!"

"Reward three, give His Highness Wanfa a top-grade defensive artifact to use as a talisman!"

"Reward four, reward His Royal Highness Wanfa Reincarnation Treasure Mirror III for reincarnation cultivation and temper the state of mind. "

"The fifth reward is to give His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws the position of envoy of the town of the Domain, which can monitor the Domain, and has the ability to replace the privilege of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and his status is second only to the Leader of the Territory Overlord-level Strength!"

"Reward sixth, give His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws one galaxy-level guard, ten god-level guards!"

"Reward seventh, reward His Royal Highness Wanfa with one Heavenly Dao Text of Wood and one Heavenly Dao Text of Water!"

"Reward No. 8, give His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws a great opportunity for universe expansion!"

"Reward No. 9, use the Cosmic God to make a move!"

"Your Highness Wanfa, this is the nine rewards given by the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and these nine rewards will be delivered to you one by one in the next few days!"

The Divine Lord said with a smile on his face.

Immediately, he handed the scroll to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian took a look, and the content on it was the same as what the Shentai God Lord said.

However, not far away.

His Highness the Holy Heaven and the others opened their mouths wide in disbelief.

"That's a great reward, isn't it?"

They had also witnessed the scene of the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race giving rewards to His Eternal Highness, but those rewards could not be compared to this time.

Last time, there were only seven rewards, and the rewards weren't as valuable as this one.

"It should be that the Supreme Hall of the Human Race lost three Ancient-level Universe Sons at once, and finally gave birth to a Universe Son, so the reward was increased!"

His Highness guessed.

He was very envious of Ye Tian, if it was him who became the son of the Eternal Universe, then these rewards would be his!

"Your Highness Wanfa, let's leave first!"

The gods of the platform are gone.

After the six town palace envoys left, the surrounding highnesses came to congratulate Ye Tian.

If before, Ye Tian swept the yellow-level area, they still had some displeasure with Ye Tian, but now they don't have it.

Where would they dare to be upset with an Eternal Ancient-level Highness, it's too late to be respectful!

Ye Tian didn't pay much attention to these highnesses, he had won so many rewards at once, and he was still a little confused in his heart, and he needed to go back and digest it well.

So, Ye Tian casually sent these highnesses away and entered his own cultivation tower.

"Master, you have become the son of the Eternal Universe, Ziya, I am also the steward of the Eternal Universe Child, and my authority has been greatly increased now!"

Ziya looked very excited, and seemed to be even happier than Ye Tian.

Ye Tian also smiled excitedly-

"I made a lot of money this time, I didn't expect the Supreme Hall of the Human Race to be so generous, and the treatment of the Eternal Ancient-level Son of the Universe is far from being comparable to the Peak-level Son of the Universe. If you can become a supreme-level son of the universe, what kind of treatment should it be?" Ye Tian thought to himself.
